title: Import and Export Metrics to Snowflake Semantic Model
description:
Integrate with Snowflake's Cortex Analyst semantic model layer to enable bidirectional metric exchange.

### Import (Priority)
- Import existing Snowflake semantic model metrics into the DataTools Pro Metrics Glossary
- Enables quick demo capability showing cross-platform metric management

### Export (Future)
- Publish DataTools Pro metrics out to Snowflake's semantic model
- Requires additional design for mapping metric definitions to Snowflake's semantic model spec

### References
- Snowflake Semantic Model Spec: https://docs.snowflake.com/en/user-guide/snowflake-cortex/cortex-analyst/semantic-model-spec
- Quickstart Guide: https://quickstarts.snowflake.com/guide/semantic_file_generation_for_cortex_analyst/
acceptance_criteria: Snowflake semantic model metrics can be imported into Metrics Glossary
Imported metrics retain their definitions and metadata
Export pathway is designed for future implementation
ux_changes: Import workflow for Snowflake semantic model metrics into the Metrics Glossary.
middleware_changes: Snowflake Cortex Analyst API integration for reading semantic model definitions.
data_model_changes: Mapping between Snowflake semantic model fields and DataTools Pro metric properties.
api_changes: Snowflake Cortex Analyst semantic model API consumption for metric import.
implementation_notes: Currently blocked. Import side is prioritized for quicker demo capability. Snowflake's semantic model has more capabilities than the current Metrics Glossary, so not all fields may map directly.
